summary: Iteration 21: Credit Wallet APIs and SmugMug-style Gallery Pricing Tiers testing complete. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend Credit Wallet page and Photographer Sessions page with gallery pricing UI verified and working correctly.

issues: Missing 'Description' or 'aria-describedby' for DialogContent - accessibility warning in console

Backend APIs - Credit Wallet.GET /api/credits/balance/{user_id}: PASS - Returns user_id, balance, currency='credits', note='1 credit = $1 USD'
Backend APIs - Credit Wallet.GET /api/credits/history/{user_id}: PASS - Returns transaction list with limit/filter support
Backend APIs - Credit Wallet.GET /api/credits/summary/{user_id}: PASS - Returns current_balance, total_earned, total_spent, breakdown
Backend APIs - Credit Wallet.POST /api/credits/purchase: PASS - Initiates Stripe checkout, returns checkout_url and session_id
Backend APIs - Credit Wallet.Invalid user handling: PASS - All endpoints return 404 for invalid user_id

Backend APIs - Gallery Pricing Tiers (Sm.GET /api/photographer/{id}/gallery-prici: PASS - Returns photo_pricing (web=$3, standard=$5, high=$10) and video_pricing (720p=$8, 1080p=$15, 4k=$30)
Backend APIs - Gallery Pricing Tiers (Sm.PUT /api/photographer/{id}/gallery-prici: PASS - Updates all 6 quality tier prices, returns updated values

Backend APIs - Live Session Participants.GET /api/photographer/{id}/live-particip: PASS - Returns is_live, participants list, total_participants, total_earnings, location, started_at

Backend APIs - Gallery Item.POST /api/gallery/item/{id}/purchase: PASS - Returns 404 for non-existent items with quality_tier parameter

Frontend - Credit Wallet Page (/wallet).Balance display: PASS - Shows $0.00 credits with '1 credit = $1 USD' note
Frontend - Credit Wallet Page (/wallet).Summary stats: PASS - Shows Total Earned and Total Spent cards
Frontend - Credit Wallet Page (/wallet).Add Credits modal: PASS - Shows $10, $25, $50, $100 packages with 'Popular' and 'Best Value' badges
Frontend - Credit Wallet Page (/wallet).Bonus credits: PASS - Shows +5 bonus for $50, +15 bonus for $100

Frontend - Sidebar Wallet Link.Active state: PASS - Wallet link highlighted when on /wallet route

Frontend - Photographer Sessions Page (/.Live Session status: PASS - Shows 'You're Live!' with Active Surfers count, Views, Earnings
Frontend - Photographer Sessions Page (/.Live participants list: PASS - Shows 'Demo Surfer $25' in Active Surfers section
Frontend - Photographer Sessions Page (/.Pricing Settings card: PASS - Shows Session Buy-in $30, Per Photo $8, Photos Included 3, Booking Rate $50/hr
Frontend - Photographer Sessions Page (/.Gallery Pricing card: PASS - Shows all 6 quality tiers with prices (web $3, standard $5, high $10, 720p $8, 1080p $15, 4k $30)
Frontend - Photographer Sessions Page (/.Edit Gallery Pricing modal: PASS - Opens with Photo Pricing and Video Pricing sections, editable input fields, platform fee info
Frontend - Photographer Sessions Page (/.Platform fee info: PASS - Shows '20% is deducted from each sale. You receive 80% of all gallery purchases.'

Frontend - Photo Tools Sidebar.Photo Tools menu: PASS - Expanded showing My Gallery, Bookings Manager, Live Sessions for photographer roles

test_steps_executed: 1. Created /app/backend/tests/test_credits_gallery_pricing.py with 15 test cases covering credit wallet APIs, gallery pricing tiers, live participants
3. Frontend: Set localStorage auth as Hobbyist photographer (ff99d26b-f1cb-4970-9275-7f6ff5e91efc)
4. Frontend: Verified /wallet page - balance display, Add Credits button/modal, packages, badges, transaction history
5. Frontend: Verified sidebar Wallet link present and accessible
6. Frontend: Verified /photographer/sessions - live status, participants list, pricing settings, gallery pricing card
7. Frontend: Verified Gallery Pricing modal with all quality tier inputs and platform fee info

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all wallet and gallery pricing UI verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Credit Wallet and SmugMug-style Gallery Pricing fully working. Photo quality tiers: web $3, standard $5, high $10. Video quality tiers: 720p $8, 1080p $15, 4k $30. Platform fee is 20%. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_credits_gallery_pricing.py covers all new APIs. Frontend routes: /wallet for credit wallet, /photographer/sessions for gallery pricing. Stripe checkout integration working for credit purchase. Demo Surfer is in live session showing live participants endpoint working.
